name: aifinyo AG
summary: aifinyo AG operates as a technology-oriented financial service provider in Germany. The company offers financing solutions for startups, freelancers, and medium-sized companies. It offers factoring solutions, including individual factoring, factoring for freelancers and the self-employed, and full service factoring; finetrading solutions consisting of purchase, warehouse, and project financing; leasing solutions comprising hire purchase, sale and lease back, and full amortization leasing; and debt collection. The company was formerly known as Elbe Finanzgruppe AG and changed its name to aifinyo AG in July 2019. The company is headquartered in Dresden, Germany.
